mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_version (template_id, version, schema_json, fields_json, change_log, created_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{version}, #{schemaJson}, #{fieldsJson}, #{changeLog}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, version, schema_json, fields_json, change_log, created_at FROM form_version WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, template_id, version, schema_json, fields_json, change_log, created_at FROM form_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT id, template_id, version, schema_json, fields_json, change_log, created_at FROM form_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND version = #{version}
